title: Cinematic Character Poster
sourceTitle: Using Cinematic Double Exposure Composition As Structural

imagePrompts.prompt:
Using a cinematic double-exposure composition as the structural foundation, AAA game key art as the visual texture, and the story of “xxx” as the soul, create a cinematic character poster for the iconic character xx from “xxx.” The poster should not only portray the character, but also serve as a reflection of their story, destiny, and era.

A massive and elegant facial silhouette of the character (either side profile or front-facing) should dominate the composition, while smaller full-body poses and dynamic actions are integrated into the scene with a dramatic sense of scale, evoking the feeling of an ultra wide-angle lens.

The character’s appearance and costume should remain faithful to the original design, but reimagined in realistic 3D live-action style: anthropomorphized as an adult with mature proportions, a powerful and sensual physique, a handsome face, and highly detailed, lifelike skin texture. Facial features and costume elements should subtly incorporate iconic traits from the original work.

The character’s expression and body language must stay true to their personality and narrative role. Integrate important story elements and emotional themes from the original plot into the composition. The overall atmosphere should feel epic, emotional, and cinematic, like a high-budget Hollywood or AAA game movie poster.

Generate the image in a 3:4 poster format.
